notes: Gravity-manipulating blocks. Currently SE2 Early Access has one: the Gravity Generator 5 m. Gravity fields can be Field/Spherical/Cylindrical shape; overlapping fields from multiple generators add together. Max acceleration is 1g (9.80665 m/s²) and can be inverted down to -1g. Wiki reports power.maxInput as '1600 W' but given similar blocks publish values in kW, this likely represents kW — flagged as uncertain.

resources.description: Generates an artificial gravity field, allowing engineers to walk on surfaces in zero-gravity environments.
dataGaps: power.unitAsPublished (wiki says 'W' but other blocks of this scale publish in kW — likely a wiki typo)
